text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, Trainer. I learned something recently.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hayahide showed me how to win the spring Tenno
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeah, though it wore me out something crazy.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: All right, Hayahide, lay it on me!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I trust you brought the notebook you've been
using to keep track of your weight?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Jumping right to my measurements? You dog,
you!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Look, fluctuations in weight affect muscle mass
and stamina, and you need to calculate your
pacing based on all those...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah, I get it. Here ya go.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Well? How'd I do?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You aren't running out of breath as much as
before. Seems like your trainer's emphasis on
basic fitness is paying off.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But, you still aren't moving your arms enough.
Your legs alone won't carry you to the finish. If I
were to come up with a method just for—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Got it. Lemme write all this down.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Hayahide? What were you gonna say?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You really are serious about this, aren't you? Ever
since I asked you to take notes, you've been
taking them without fail.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, that's what you told me to do right from
the get-go.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
All the same, I commend you for making it a habit
so quickly.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: On the other hand, you do keep asking me to explain terminology I've already explained numerous times.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
That's... well... Let's just say I reeeally appreciate
you always explaining things to me.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But just know that I'm gonna do my best, in my
own dumb way!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Because... well, there are people out there who
believe I can do amazing things.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Since you're aiming for the Tenno Sho, let me
finish with this most important of lessons.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Which is?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
How to win the spring Tenno Sho—no, how to win
any race. Based on my experience...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: She said to just hang in there.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: To look at the runners beside you, behind you, in front of you, and tell yourself... "I am not losing to any of them!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, the stands at Kyoto Racecourse are
bustling with spectators.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, this year has a great lineup. I wonder if that
wild one is running too.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I dunno, but Golshi's my pick for the win.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Really? Her? I don't think she's on the level to win, or even to put up a fight.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, that's why she's my pick! She's the only one
for me!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So you're finally here. We've all been waiting for
you.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Take a look. Look at all the faces out there.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...And?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ha, you really don't get it? This is the prestigious
stage of the spring Tenno Sho. So... which are
you?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
When you're eating fried eggs... are you team hot
sauce or team soy sauce?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uh, I like mayo...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ehhhhhnt!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hark! The buzzer of battle has sounded! And I
won't be satisfied till I've captured you as a
perfect specimen of petri dish idiocy!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I have zero idea what you mean, but can
you cut it out with the scary words?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Well... you're actually something yourself.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Forget about the audience. Coming out to this
mountain just to become a mushroom to my
bamboo shoot isn't exactly normal, you know.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: H-huh?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Well, how about we make it a contest? Let's find
out who the bigger dummy is!
